name: aletheia-os
description: Repo-native project-state OS for agentic development. Initializes, orients, maintains, validates, and checkpoints repositories using the AletheiaOS .aletheia control plane.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-native project-state control plane for AI-assisted work.
interface.longDescription: AletheiaOS keeps durable project state in .aletheia/ and gives Codex a repo-native control plane for orientation, model gating, validation, checkpoints, and structured execution.
defaultPrompt: Checkpoint durable state after meaningful work.
